entity.summary: Ethereum decentralized margin exchange providing leveraged ETH and BTC trading, borrowing, lending, limit and stop-limit orders, and audited smart-contract trading infrastructure.
entity.notes: Current first-party DDEX website remains reachable and exposes trading and lending entry points, margin trading, borrowing, lending, limit orders, stop-limit orders, audit links, developer documentation, and smart-contract resources. DefiLlama independently reports current Ethereum TVL.

evidence.title: DDEX official exchange website
evidence.notes: Current first-party website exposes Start Trading and Earn Interest entry points and documents decentralized margin trading, leverage, borrowing, lending, limit and stop-limit orders, and audited smart contracts.

evidence.title: DDEX margin exchange developer documentation
evidence.notes: First-party developer documentation is linked from the official DDEX website and supports the margin-exchange and protocol identity.

evidence.title: DDEX metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry identifies DDEX as an Ethereum decentralized margin exchange and reports current protocol TVL.
